This Prof has ALOT of office hrs for those complaining they don't "get it". Very helpful, but you have to do the work. + the other teacher has a higher failing rate right now. Wei cares if you pass!
He is the WORST prof .doesn't care abut none . don't take him his accent is crazy !!! RUN AWAY FRM HIS CLASS

Very sweet man and wants to see his students do well. Although the class is not easy but it can be done as long as you take it seriously, read the text book and PRACTICE! He is extremely reasonable and drop an exam and two quizzes.

Literally the worst professor I have ever had. Cannot understand a single thing he says. Withdrew from the class after a month. If you stay in his class you will need to go to tutoring regularly because there is no way you will pass by just attending his boring, useless lectures.

I took him for the summer course and he was great! The accent I had to get used to but the tests and homework were easy. One thing I didn't like about him was his grading for example..I would have the same exact answer as someone else and we would have different points taken off.

While his accent can be a little difficult to understand at times (not nearly as bad as others), Wei knows what he's talking about. Is able to explain any aspect of the material in multiple ways and does an excellent job at conveying the material, albeit seldom misspellings. Tests are scaled, along with the overall grade.
The worst professor ever. Could never understand him, and he makes it impossible to listen. Failed so many students this semester.RUN AWAY!

He is a very sweet, dedicated man, but he's from China, where students are competent in the material he teaches in his courses when they are in 8th grade. He is slowly adjusting to the "different" academic climate in the US, but this is not a class to take unless you have some proficiency in Chemistry beforehand.

His English is hard to understand but his handouts are powerful. He put all he covers in PDF file leaving space you can write down the examples he explains. OWL almost killed me! He is a nice person and is also willing to help you. Visit his office often and He can give you his help as much as he can.

extremely hard to understand his english... if you don't sit in the front row you've got even less of a chance of understanding. tests are very difficult, he doesnt explain anything, and OWL is miserable. the final was really hard, but it's easy to google the answers. you'll pass, but won't learn anything.

His English is hard to understand but he puts everything on the overhead and sends you packets for his lecture which is helpful. Doesn't answer questions during class. Gives quizzes during recitation. Extra Credit for going to tutoring, recommended! Tests are difficult. Owl is arduous. STUDY

Extremely hard to understand. He does make handouts that are his notes which you should check because he writes the wrong formula frequently. His grading is really inconsistent and has no logic behind it. Not willing to answer questions.

Means well as a teacher, but hard to understand methods, does not help you with homework (OWL is a pain- do all tutoring) and grades tests/quizzes poorly. He gave one student 0 points for a problem with one error and another student with half the problem right 2 out of 8. Wouldn't recommend unless you're skilled in chemistry
If all u want is to pass chemistry, Take him. wouldn't recommend if ur a chem major. I passed his class with an A, and never went to class.

Everyone is hating on him, but if you try your butt off and show it, and go to him during office hours, he is not that bad of a guy. He will provide the help you need and just work at it. His handouts are your key to success. Even though he does not use the book, read it! Do the practice probs! A lot of those probs are actually on the exams!
very difficlut to understand what he is saying. he does not clearly go over the steps he does in his mind to get an answer to a problem. ONE OF THE WORST TEACHERS IVE EVER HAD.
doesn't give you the help when you need it
Should do your Hw. If you skip class and not do any homework you will not udnerstand the material. Not much learning going on from the book. Explains things weird

I would not recommend anyone to take Chemistry 101 with this professor. He doesn't teach very well at all. His english is very poor. He doesn't follow the book and the book is the only way you can understand the material. I have never been in a class where I had no idea what we were learning. He is not helpful during office hours either.

Nursing majors get out now. Hard to understand and he can't answer your questions because he doesn't know what you're saying. He scaled all the grades at the end so that everyone passed but it's not worth the stress of the semester. Need the book because you have to teach yourself everything.

Professor Wimberly is one of the best English teachers I've ever had. Her energy and positivity are contagious, and her lectures are thoughtful. Classwork is easy, and she's very generous when it comes to grading & late work. She's responsive and always available to answer any questions. I'd absolutely take her again; best professor for a 1st year

Professor Wimberly is so so so kind! her class is very easy with only 4 major assignments. she's super lenient about due dates. every question I've had she's been able to give me exactly the answer I needed. she tends to overexplain for how simple the class/assignments are though.

Professor Wimberly is a sweetheart! You have 3 major assignments in this class with very simple classwork and no exams. A few frustrating things is her canceling class often and the lectures can get boring. Also, sometimes we will have class just to discuss the simplest of things. Other than that, it's good! Also, I'm taking her again next semester
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Caring--Accessible outside class

reviews.comment: Great person take her class and try to show up.

This class was relatively easy. Super nice. Canceled a lot and/or ended class early. Only 4 MA that were not difficult at all if you can write. Takes no longer than like a week to submit something. She doesn't care about when you turn it in as long as you send it eventually. Extremely lenient about cw. Highly recommend!
She's a very nice person but, she doesn't care about her students.The work she gives is very vague and complex. Best of luck asking for help and see if you'll get it.

Prof. Wimberly is an amazing professor. If you struggle with English classes, like I do, I recommend taking her. She made everything simple. She is very laid back and easy to work with if you put in the work.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Graded by few things--Clear grading criteria

reviews.comment: She is a wonderful professor! She is so kind to her students and genuinely cares about them. She also expresses interest in learning about her students. She gives a lot of good feedback and responds quickly to emails. She also is very forgiving if you come in late. She is also lenient with due dates and very flexible and understanding.

I love prof. W. She is such a kind-hearted soul. She takes the time to get to know you and help you with your assignments if you need it. She does cancel class sometimes but it's okay because she makes sure we know what we're doing. All assignments are due on the last day of finals but trust me, they aren't that bad so just get them done asap

she is one of the sweetest professors you will probably have. she cares about her students and makes that very know. flexible with deadlines and cancels class often. the only downside is that she isn't very accessible outside of class and rarely responds to emails. I would take her again though.
Was very upset with her . She is not good at responding to emails would not recommend her again. Will not take another course with her

Shes very nice and sweet. However she canceled a lot and was late a lot of the time, which is nice once in a while but it was very annoying when you would show up and she didnt. Shes very good and knows a lot and I would take her again.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Respected--Graded by few things

reviews.comment: Professor Wimberely is a great professor. She outlines all most all of her essays and is an easy grader. On occasion, she does give extra credit opportunities. She gave some homework but not a lot. There were four major assignments and the future essays get easier. She does not care about when you turn it in as long as you turn in your best work.
She's very kind, If I could, I would've taken it again, I'd recommend her if she's in between for you to pick! Easy A.����

Shes awesome! Shes nice& a softy when it comes to passing things in late& redoing projects. My only reason for a 4 star is that she doesnt post your grades & can take a very long time to respond to email if at all. I havent really known my grade all semester, she just says you got an A and not much more to it, but she is always ready to help!
Suzanne Wimberly is honestly the best English teacher I've had so far. She is so understanding and is open to helping you out.
I took ENL 102 with Wimberly with my friend. She was very nice and understanding if you miss assignments. As long as you do the homework you will do well, just don't slack.
Wonderful professor. She is always there for you when you need help! Offers many extra credit opportunities. She is not strict on due dates, however she takes attendance every class.
Easy A!!!
I would recommend her to anyone. So nice and completely understanding.

She's a great professor. Extends due dates for papers, allows you to revise your papers to get higher grades, and is always willing to help you.  Only test we took was the final exam which was just a short writing assignment and it only counted as 5% of the final grade. If you can get a class with her take it.

She is the best teacher I have so far at UMD. If i emailed her she would get back to me within the hour. She is an amazing teacher and compromises with the class.  She gives great feedback and will extend due dates if you need more time. I would highly recommend taking her class.
Hands down the best professor I have ever had! She is very understanding, and lets you pass in late work. She made my first year of college non-stressful!

Let me begin by saying that all professors should be more like her. She encouraged students to do well in her class and always came into EVERY single class with a happy and positive attitude. The work load for this course is very manageable and her weekly quizzes and final paper were fair. She is must take and UMASS should be grateful to have her.
Super easy class and always there to help! She is wonderful

Great professor. She understands we have lives outside school and she lets you turn in work late. She also lets you take papers home and re-due them to improve your grade. I would recommend her for any English class. She's not your typical English professor she's the best .
SHE IS AN ANGEL. PROFESSIONAL AND HELPFUL! THE WORLD NEEDS MORE PROFESSORS LIKE HER!  - THANKS PROF. W

The class was very easy. If you want an easy A, I would take her class. She also drops the lowest quiz and doubles the highest quiz at the end of the semester. She's very laid back and barely takes attendance.

She is absolutely amazing! She is super nice and very helpful. I would definitely take her again. There are no quizzes or any final. Just 4 essays, which are kind of back to back, but overall not bad.
WONDERFUL PROFESSOR! would take her again. really nice and extremely accommodating & helpful. TAKE HER CLASS if you need to take an english class!

She is very nice, this class was pretty easy, we used the book everyday, we have quizzes every week on a poem that we read, but we always went over the poem before the test and you could use the book during the test. Really laid back setting, I didn't need to take much notes

She's really nice and she doesn't have defined deadlines. Though she was nice, I found her extremely boring and had no desire to go to class. Prof. Wimberly allowed 6 absences but most kids didn't show up more than once a week or so. Her grading is also basically if she likes you, you get an A.

Great professor.  She is always willing to help.  She gives 6 absences.  None of the due dates are official except that everything is due by the end of the semester, but she doesn't mention that.  I would definitely take her again.

This professor was great! She is a really kind woman, very upbeat and interesting. She makes class goes by  pretty quickly, and is very flexible with due dates like others have mentioned. She is also flexible on topic of papers, never forcing you to write about a stuffy, dry topic like others. She gives you 6 absences, but does take attendance.

Amazing professor. Gives you 6 absences! essay topics are awesome. and if you dont pass it in on time she accepts them late for full credit. First class she says she doesnt believe in tests and quizes. She doesnt give a single test or quiz. she only believes in essays. we only wrote 4 for the semester. Loved this professor and learned a lot.
Great teacher, very easy if effort is put in. Really helpful but can be a bit dreary.
She is super easy
She is such a sweetheart! She gives 5 essays for the semester and helps you along the way. Very easy to talk to and the assignments are simple enough.
Easiest professor ever. Very possitive, flexible due dates, easy A. Don't buy books.
Awesome. Allows 6 absences and allows easy extension on papers. Wicked Nice. Request her now

She is a very nice teacher and very flexible. Deadlines can be easily extended with the smallest excuse. Her grading style is very easy i put in minimal effort and came away with at least a B on every paper. Highly recomennded teacher for english 101
Very good teacher. very understandable and approachable. Is truly here for the students. Shes fun and chill too so don't worry about getting to bogged up ina serious class
Her class is pretty difficult. Used the books every once in a while. She's really nice, I just didn't understand her explanations most of the time.
He makes a lot of jokes that are very funny! All of the quizzes are open notes. No tests, finals, or midterms! Only 3 major assignments for the whole semester!

One of the best professor's I have had so far. Professor is very knowledgeable in this field, and he cares about his work. Attendance is mandatory to a limit (no less than 6 absent). Overall a must take class under this professor. Very easy grading. 
You will not regret it :)
Have fun!!

I'm genuinely sad he doesn't teach more English classes here, 10/10 absolutely would take again no hesitation. Instruction is clear and concise while not being obtuse or pretentious, and the instructor clearly knows his subject well. Principled but not inflexible, I could not recommend him more.
reviews.rating_tags: Amazing lectures --Clear grading criteria--Gives good feedback

reviews.comment: Great professor. He has a good sense of humor and he goes step by step with you on every assignment. He gives you 3 major essays and 3-4 reading quizzes which are all fairly simple as he's always available to help and answer questions.

Mr. Higgins is a very smart man who makes learning about english relatively enjoyable. There was 3 major essays and a few quizzes on readings through out the semester, I AM NOT a enjoyer of writing especially long formatted essays but his step by step. process makes it digestible.
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Respected--Accessible outside class

reviews.comment: While just sitting Infront of him, you call feel Will's immense smarts. He is the smartest and kindest person I have ever met. Highly recommend.
Amazing professor. Assignments are on point, gives homework help, and has a agenda of the whole semester so there are no surprises.
reviews.rating_tags: Amazing lectures --Clear grading criteria--Gives good feedback

reviews.comment: Professor is great and easy to learn from.
He was great. Had him for 2 semesters, and really loved the class. Directions were clear, and he uses Google Classroom which makes things a lot easier.
Great professor goes over everything multiple times, grades pretty easy, there is no reason to not pass this class. Some of his readings could be boring at the start but they pick up at the end.

In the semester he only gave 2 quizzes and 3 essays in total. He prepares you for the essays, he is available outside of office hours even right after class. Extremly understanding and makes the class interesting. Funny at times.
Great teacher, lot of homework reading and writing. Good class just apply yourself and you will pass

Wilbur Higgins combines an interesting and in-depth course with strong teaching methods, modern class material (like google classroom), and a sharp sense of humor. Only take this course if you want to enjoy learning about critical writing and reading skills. If you want a boring and uninforming professor, look elsewhere.

Overall good class, almost like an AP High School English class. Good amount of homework but doable. Makes a lot of jokes in class. Professor is patient and good at helping students understand the material.
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Gives good feedback--Lots of homework

reviews.comment: Professor Higgins is a fantastic professor. He is very straight-forward about attendance, reading/homework assignments, and grading policies. His lectures are great and help you get a better understanding of how to approach assignments. Google Classroom was used for everything; which I prefer over myCourses or Cengage. Overall, great class.
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Clear grading criteria--Gives good feedback

reviews.comment: Very fun

First and foremost, I'd recommend this class to anyone who's looking for a really good English teacher. He teaches his lessons in a really interesting way while still managing to get the main point across. Secondly, he's a pretty laid back teacher as long as you do your work and actually put effort in.

Will Higgins is a great professor, who I had the pleasure of having as a teacher in high school. The class in question (ENL 101) was taught well, wasn't difficult but it was challenging (as in, if you apply yourself it can be an easy A, if not, easy F). I look forwards to his spring ENL 102 class, and can only recommend this professor.
Great professor, a lot of reading and writing assignments but its English class. Super funny guy and class is always super interesting.
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Amazing lectures --Accessible outside class

reviews.comment: Higgins is an amazing professor, the best ENL 101 course you could take. He follows the syllabus so you'll never be lost on which assignment is due. 3 Major writing assignments during course but he prepares you for each assignment. Attendance does matter but he grants you 3 free absences.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Participation matters--Clear grading criteria

reviews.comment: Professor Higgins was by far one of my favorite professors I had this semester. I always hated English classes but he actually made it enjoyable. He explains everything very clearly and gives quick and good feedback to strengthen your writing. I definitely recommend taking his class if you aren't a fan of English because he actually makes it fun
Mr. Higgins is a great professor. If you need help you will get help right away. He is a great person and I would take him every year if I could. If you see him on the courses to take TAKE HIM!!!!.

Higgins knows its an intro writing class so he doesn't make it difficult. His assignments are to the point and given so that you can write about truly anything (as long as it pertains to the class topic). I probably spent less than 2 hours a week on assignments and I got an A, but if you rush and don't do it correctly you will fail. He is great!

Mr. Higgins is excellent! He is willing to help you in and out of the classroom. I've emailed him several times about projects and stuff and he responds every time. He's not too bad with homework either, but it's mostly graded for accuracy vs completed on time. He's not big with tests, but there are some and they are open note! Overall, he's great!
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Accessible outside class--Participation matters

reviews.comment: I took Professor Higgins for English 101 & 102 and he is literally the best professor that one could ask for. He is caring, funny, and really respectful. He understands that everyone is at different levels when it comes to writing assignments and he does what he can to improve your writing. Attendance is mandatory, but c'mon it's college y'all.

Professor Higgins is a amazing professor. He gives you opportunities to revise work for a higher grade. Anyone could enjoy his class regardless of talent in English or not. He is very caring and helpful. I took him for both Eng 101 and 102 and even if the time was later in the day, I still chose him because he is a great professor.

the best english professor I have ever had. If you work hard on all your papers the final paper will be really easy. All his work is online so no need to ever have to print things out. this class pushed me to become a better writer. This school needs to hire more people like him
Honestly I worked hard and something good out of it and thats all I can ask for.

Professor Higgins was the best professor I've had. He's funny & engaging, and even if the readings can be boring he finds ways to make them interesting. There are 4  papers, but they're wicked easy if you pay attention in class, and he provides all the sources for the papers (and bibliographies!). I would love to take another one of his classes!
Funny guy, considerate of students workload outside of class

He's the best teacher I've ever had here. EASY af, just have to write the papers like he says. gives you four papers & one group project that takes like 5 mins... He does give quizzes and makes you read so you know what he's taking about in class. Some of the readings are boring, but they're easy to read.

Fantastic professor, I can't compliment him enough. He's straightforward, grades quickly with great feedback, and makes all his expectations clear. The workload isn't too much, I learned a lot in his class and enjoyed the readings. Great personality, wants students to succeed... I would love to take one of his classes again! Highly recommend.

The best English teacher I've ever had. So nice, caring, and wants you to succeed. He's funny and he gives you readings that are actually interesting. He lets you revise papers which is good because you can increase your grade and become a better writer. I'm taking him again next semester. I looked forward to this class every week. But don't skip.

Such an amazing professor and even better guy. Professor Higgins makes you want to put full effort into the course by making all the readings and papers (no matter how obscure) seem so interesting. None of the topics covered are ever noting either. Taking him again for ENL102 even though it's a late class because he's the GOAT
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Hilarious--Get ready to read

reviews.comment: DO NOT SKIP CLASS!  You will not pass if you skip!  However, Higgins is a knowledgable man and will help you with whatever you need!   Also we used current events and we could write basically whatever we wanted about them!  He also does not like late work.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Skip class? You won't pass.--LOTS OF HOMEWORK

reviews.comment: This is the second time I've taken Professor Higgins and I must say I never regret taking this professor. He is always willing to help, gives great feedback, and lets you revise your papers if you don't like the grade you received. His dry wit makes the class interesting, even when we go over a boring reading. Please take this professor if you can.

Professor Higgins is one of the best professors I've taken my freshman year. He is always willing to help his students. His quick wit makes the class entertaining. He gives you several essays, including one PowerPoint presentation, and he gives you another chance to re-do your essay if you don't like the grade you received.

He's an incredibly helpful professor and he's super sarcastic. He only has four big things and then little quizzes throughout the semester and you don't even need the everyday writer in his 101 class. He's willing to help you out if you need it, but know he doesn't really accept late work and you only get two absences

Great teacher does not have extremely high expectations, if you do the work it's an easy A. Gives four major assignments and the rest are all small homework assignments which take 30 minutes or less. Not much reading is assigned. Not a harsh grader on the essays. Extends deadlines.

He is literally the best english teacher I have ever encountered. Essays are very easy, he extends deadlines to meet your needs. On top of all this he is really a great guy with a good sense of humor. If you can fit this class into your schedule then do so immeditely! I'm just upset that I cannot take him next simester.

Great professor and even better person. Guidelines for essays very clear and he always let you revise them. The readings are boring but he still manages to make them entertaining in class. Always willing to help a student out.
Great Guy!! Willing to work with any student!
Great professor! Helpful, courteous, and keeps material relevant with many editorials, attendance is key but a great class and a great guy!

A wonderful prof and person. The best ENL course and teacher I've had. I received Cs on my first two papers. But, he worked with me to help make the rest of them A-worthy. Has a sarcastic and witty sense of humor. Teaches a broad range of lessons. Topics for the paper are interesting and relevant. Gives quizzes after hw readings. Take this teacher.

One of the Best teachers easily. Not only did i learn a lot from this class. He had me thinking every time i left his class. Always spoke of interesting topics. Showed interesting videos in class. Also gave enjoyable papers to write. Take this guy if you can. He's the man.

He is one of the best teachers I ever had! I highly recommend him. He is very laid back and extremely helpful and supportive. The essays are easy and if your paper isn't as good as you would of liked it to be then he lets you do it over. He also gives a lot of extra credit opportunities!
great teacher...probably my favorite ever. the class isnt very hard theres about 4-5 papers

Prof. Higgins was by far one of my favorite professors! He is really chill and great at what he does. He is so helpful and although I hate english, he made it enjoyable. If you have the chance to take his class, take it!
He is a good teacher, very good looking enjoyed hime very muchhhh

If you have to take ENL 101/102, take them with this guy. He is very straight forward, funny, and reasonable. He will help you and give you extensions if you need them. The only thing I can complain about is the quizzes - they can be hard. But he is a cool guy and has interesting things to say. We watched Sicko too, and other interesting stuff.

Great teacher.  I loved going to this class.  some pointless readings and the quizzes were pretty hard but he is very helpful.  5 papers for the semester but they are pretty easy and he is very helpful and always willing to edit papers with you.  He takes attendance every class.

he is an extremely amazing teacher...he knows what hes doing, and makes his guidelines known to the class at all times for papers and such. He is very interesting, and one of my fav professors right now :)

I hate having to take English, but this guy made it alright.  Good teacher, very clear on what he wants you to do and it's easy to follow.  Good sense of humor, too bad the class was quiet and disinterested.
No Comments

This is my favorite professor at UMD! He is extremely knowledgable and I learned a lot from his class. He is really nice and understanding and cares about his students. You do have to work for your grade, but the assignments and readings are interesting and enjoyable. I've already taken his class twice and would definetely take his class again!
you have to do your work but hes a great teacher...final project is big but u have time to do it.

Prof Downey is an absolute delight of a Professor. He is very understanding when it comes to the individual needs of students. Very passionate about his course material, which is very refreshing for a lecture-based course.

One of my favorite professors I've had at UMASSD. His workload is manageable and he's an easy grader. He gives great feedback and is very considerate of student's outside lives and circumstances. I would absolutely take a course with him again.

Walker Downey has been my professor for 3 semesters in Art History. He is an easy grader, he doesn't judge and he is ready to help you when you ask for it. I never had trouble in his class and always passed with an A/A+. His lectures can be pretty long, but it is worth it since he is so passionate in his field of work. You will 100% pass!
